name: Fantasy
description: Isekai, cultivation, and mythical world stories with epic visual scale

character_blueprints.name: Kai
character_blueprints.description: Young warrior with determined eyes, flowing robes mixed with armor, mystical markings.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Young warrior with flowing dark robes and light armor, determined gaze, mystical glowing markings on hands

character_blueprints.name: Elder Yun
character_blueprints.description: Wise elderly figure, long white beard, flowing traditional robes, serene expression.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Wise elderly man with long white beard, flowing traditional white robes, serene knowing expression, holding a staff

character_blueprints.name: Dark Lord Zar
character_blueprints.description: Imposing dark figure, black ornate armor, glowing red eyes, intimidating presence.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Imposing dark warrior in ornate black armor, glowing red eyes, dark aura, intimidating towering presence

scene_library.name: Crystal Palace
scene_library.prompt: Magnificent crystal palace interior, glowing crystals, ethereal light, grand throne room, fantasy architecture

scene_library.name: Enchanted Forest
scene_library.prompt: Mystical enchanted forest, bioluminescent plants, floating particles, magical atmosphere, ancient trees

scene_library.name: Battlefield
scene_library.prompt: Epic fantasy battlefield, magical energy clashes, dramatic sky, scattered warriors, cinematic scale

scene_library.name: Mountain Peak Temple
scene_library.prompt: Ancient temple on mountain peak above clouds, sunrise, mystical fog, sacred atmosphere, epic vista

color_grade.name: Epic Fantasy
color_grade.description: High saturation with magical glow effects

shot_rhythm.style_notes: Wide establishing shots for scale, slow motion for power moments, sweeping camera movements

prompt_templates.en: Epic cinematic shot, {character} in {scene}, {action}, magical lighting effects, high saturation, fantasy atmosphere, volumetric light, 4K quality
prompt_templates.zh: 史诗电影镜头，{character}在{scene}中，{action}，魔法光效，高饱和度，奇幻氛围，体积光，4K画质
